rationale: The cited paper is directly in the same core domain (incentive-compatible WTP/reservation-price measurement, compared against BDM/Vickrey) and introduces a specific elicitation approach (ICERANGE), while the citing paper’s stated contribution is to extend prior WTP-method comparisons across elicitation methods and real-purchase benchmarks. Given this strong topical/methodological overlap and the citing paper’s explicit positioning against prior subset-comparison studies, this is not an obvious incidental mention based on the available evidence (DOI-matched reference).
